compiled_state.title: test-doc-migration: CLAUDE.md shim enforcement description contains literal CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts pattern
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: mechanical. CLAUDE.md line 50 (shim enforcement section) contained literal ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ pattern which triggered test_no_legacy_plugin_root_refs. Fix: rephrased detection pattern descriptions to avoid literal variable-prefixed paths. Other 2 CI failures (test-sprint-continuation-guidance, test-sprint-next-batch) are intermittent — pass locally on both worktree and main state.
comments.author: Test
